revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data U.S. Virgin Islands/doc]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data U.S. Virgin Islands/doc]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Country data templates of insular areas of the United States|United States Virgin Islands]] [[Category:United States Virgin Islands templates|Country data]]
}}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Country data templates of insular areas of the United States|United States Virgin Islands]] [[Category:United States Virgin Islands templates|Country data]]
}}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Country data templates of insular areas of the United States|United States Virgin Islands]] [[Category:United States Virgin Islands templates|Country data]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_U.S._Virgin_Islands%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
